text: Here's what science actually says about affinity maturation. Affinity maturation is a key process in our immune system, enhancing our body’s ability to fight infections. It involves the fine-tuning of antibodies, making them better at recognizing pathogens. Research shows that this process occurs in germinal centers, where B cells rapidly mutate to improve their efficiency. The result? A stronger immune response, capable of tackling diverse infections. Want to dive deeper into science? Hit that follow button!
